title: I Am Suzanne!
writer: Rowland V. Lee, Edwin Justus Mayer
actors: Lilian Harvey, Gene Raymond, Leslie Banks
plot: Tony Malatini, a puppeteer, at Paris' Theatre des Marionettes notices that his audience consists of only 7 people. He visits his successful competitor on the corner to see why people are drawn to it. After seeing Suzanne, the comp...
